message:
feat(focus,modal): collapsed focus trap specs, empty-trap recovery, and remove_group_without_repair

Major refactor of the modal focus coordinator to handle degenerate trap
stacks where modals have been gutted of focusable members (e.g. via
with_focus_graph_mut removing nodes while modals are open).

Focus manager changes (manager.rs):
- Remove trap_return_focus(group_id) — replaced by collapsed trap spec
  logic in the coordinator that handles empty groups
- Add logical_focus_target() — returns the active focus target without
  side effects, used during trap spec evaluation
- Add remove_group_without_repair(group_id) — removes a group and its
  trap stack entries without triggering focus repair, allowing the
  coordinator to batch removals before a single repair pass

Modal coordinator changes (focus_integration.rs):
- pop_modal_by_id: when removing the top modal by ID, delegate to
  pop_modal() for consistent top-modal handling instead of duplicating
  the pop logic with special-cased blur handling
- For non-top modal removal, use remove_group_without_repair to avoid
  mid-stack focus repair oscillation
- New collapsed_focus_trap_specs(): iterates the stack bottom-up,
  collapsing out traps whose groups have no focusable members while
  preserving their return_focus chain. Returns the collapsed specs plus
  a trailing_failed_restore target for the degenerate case where the
  top trap has no focusable members
- rebuild_focus_traps: completely rewritten to use collapsed specs,
  handling both focused and blurred states with proper fallback chains
  through trailing_failed_restore → base_focus
- with_focus_graph_mut: more precise post-mutation restore logic that
  checks whether the current focus target is actually still valid
  before attempting restoration
- Helper methods: group_has_focusable_member, focus_target_is_focusable,
  focus_target_in_group for readability

Adds 8 new tests covering:
- pop_all restores base focus without intermediate hop
- pop_id top modal preserves underlying selected control
- pop_id trapped modal while blurred with only non-trapped remaining
- with_focus_graph_mut blurred/focused empty trap restores base
- with_focus_graph_mut empty top trap restores underlying control
- with_focus_graph_mut empty lower trap retargets surviving top

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
